# BP-105 positive variant: a refresh token has Secure but not HttpOnly.
lang: go
file: BP-105-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func issue(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "refresh_token", Secure: true, Path: "/"})
}
